[binaries]
# Compilers
c = '/usr/local/toolchain/x86_64-neobox-linux-musl-toolchain/bin/clang'
cpp = '/usr/local/toolchain/x86_64-neobox-linux-musl-toolchain/bin/clang++'
strip = '/usr/local/toolchain/x86_64-neobox-linux-musl-toolchain/bin/llvm-strip'

# Other binaries

[built-in options]

[properties]
sys_root = '/usr/local/toolchain/x86_64-neobox-linux-musl-toolchain'

[host_machine]
cpu = 'x86_64'
cpu_family = 'x86_64'
endian = 'little'
system = 'linux'
subsystem = 'neobox'
